name: Jawab Demo Dental

faq.parking: Free parking available in the basement.
faq.insurance: We accept major insurance including Daman, Thiqa, and Nextcare.

greetingKhaleeji: هلا والله! لاحظنا اتصالكم. شلون أقدر أساعدكم بحجز موعد؟
greetingEnglish: Hi there! We noticed we missed your call. How can I help you book an appointment?
